BriefcaseDefinition.description: Default Field Forms briefcase. Primes form templates and all linked-form runtime data for field technicians so the neuraFormMobile component works disconnected. Pair with the standard FSL briefcases that prime ServiceAppointment / WorkOrder / WorkOrderLineItem / WorkType.
BriefcaseDefinition.label: Field Forms Default

objects.description: All Form_Template records that have at least one Default_Form or Linked_Form mapped for this user. Templates are reference data so we prime the full active set rather than filtering by user.
Form pages for primed templates (1 level deep).
Form sections for primed templates (2 levels deep).
Form questions for primed templates (3 levels deep). Briefcase queries are limited to 3-level depth; the JSON snapshot fields on Form_Template are the offline-read fallback.
Default_Form mappings keyed by WorkType. Used by the draft-parent fallback in neuraFormMobile to materialize a Linked_Form locally when the host record itself was created offline.
Linked_Form runtime records visible to the current user (filtered server-side by sharing).
